holdings.infoBox: SMIG is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Silicon Motion Technology stock at 5.66%, Targa Resources at 5.07%, Snap-on at 4.63%, Victory Capital Holdings at 4.56%, and Gildan Activewear at 4.51%.

overview.description: The Bahl & Gaynor Small/Mid Cap Income Growth ETF (SMIG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US mid and small-cap companies that selects and weights securities based on the advisers assessment. SMIG was launched on Aug 25, 2021 and is issued by Bahl & Gaynor.
